MAP_LITTLEROOT_TOWN.speaker: Young Woman
dialogue: I grew up here, but I left for a while after everything with Pacifidlog...
The delta there is barely recognizable now. Too much water, too fast.
This town still feels the same somehow. I needed that.

MAP_LITTLEROOT_TOWN.speaker: Boy
dialogue: Professor Birch keeps saying the Pokémon in the tall grass are different now.
I haven't seen a Poochyena in weeks. Dad says they moved south.
